davR 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Geosphere API
    • Kfz-Daten – Österreich (Neuzulassungen & Bestand)

Incrementally Archive Geosphere Data (Simple Batched Version)

geosphere_archive_station_data.Rd

Downloads data from Geosphere and saves it to a local archive by batching stations and time periods to minimize API calls. Respects API rate limits (5 requests/second, 240/hour) and request size limits (1M values for CSV).

Usage

geosphere_archive_station_data(
  resource_id,
  params = c("tl", "ts", "tlmax", "tsmax"),
  archive_dir = "geosphere_station_archive",
  start_date = NULL,
  end_date = NULL,
  station_ids = NULL,
  station_batch_size = NULL,
  time_batch_size = "month",
  api_delay_secs = 0.2,
  api_url = "https://dataset.api.hub.geosphere.at",
  print_url = FALSE,
  download_all_params = FALSE,
  interactive = TRUE
)

Arguments

resource_id

The dataset ID to archive (e.g., "klima-v2-10min").

params

Vector of parameters to download (e.g., c("tl", "ts", "tlmax", "tsmax")).

archive_dir

The root directory for the archive.

start_date

Optional. The start date for the download (YYYY-MM-DD). If NULL, the function uses each station's specific valid_from date.

end_date

Optional. The end date for the download (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the current system date.

station_ids

Optional vector of station IDs. If NULL, all stations are used.

station_batch_size

Number of stations to query together (default: calculated based on rate limits).

time_batch_size

Time period to query at once: "day", "week", "month", "year" (default: "month").

api_delay_secs

Seconds to wait between each API call (default: 0.2 to respect 5 req/sec limit).

api_url

Base URL for the Geosphere API.

print_url

If TRUE, prints the full URL that will be requested for each API call.

download_all_params

Logical. If TRUE, downloads data for all available parameters for the resource instead of using the params argument. Requires user confirmation in interactive sessions. Defaults to FALSE.

interactive

Logical. If TRUE (default), prompts for user confirmation when download_all_params = TRUE. If FALSE, proceeds automatically with all parameters.

Value

Invisibly returns a list containing counts of downloaded, skipped, and failed files.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  # Basic usage with default parameters
  geosphere_archive_station_data(
    resource_id = "klima-v2-1d",
    start_date = "2024-01-01",
    end_date = "2024-01-31"
  )

  # Download all available parameters (with confirmation prompt)
  geosphere_archive_station_data(
    resource_id = "klima-v2-1d",
    download_all_params = TRUE,
    start_date = "2024-01-01",
    end_date = "2024-01-31"
  )

  # Non-interactive mode with all parameters
  geosphere_archive_station_data(
    resource_id = "klima-v2-1d",
    download_all_params = TRUE,
    interactive = FALSE,
    start_date = "2024-01-01",
    end_date = "2024-01-31"
  )
} # }
